project_type: React SPA with Vite, Firebase (Firestore), TailwindCSS
test_command: npm run build (no tests, use build as verification)
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run build' to ensure compilation succeeds with no errors.
environment_constraints: No test framework. Build verification is the primary check. Firebase is already configured with real credentials in src/firebase.js.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Follow existing code patterns in App.jsx.
key_patterns: Single monolithic App.jsx (6374 lines) contains most logic. Workspace state is an array of workspace objects, each containing nodes/edges/groups/pins arrays. State is managed via useState hooks. Workspaces have IDs like 'ws-${Date.now()}'. Objects (nodes, groups, edges, pins) are created inline in callback functions. Auto-save to localStorage + Firestore (fire-and-forget). Projects system wraps workspaces. defaultWorkspaces constant provides initial data.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx - main component, all workspace/object creation/duplication/deletion logic
src/firebaseService.js - saves/loads projects to Firestore as JSON blob
src/PinPanel.jsx - Pin management panel (reads pins from workspace objects)
src/FullTaskManager.jsx - Task manager (tasks are project-level, not workspace-level)
src/MiniMap.jsx - renders minimap from workspace nodes/groups/pins
directory_structure: Flat src/ directory with App.jsx as the monolith. Supporting components: MiniMap, PinPanel, ReminderPanel, FullTaskManager, MarkdownRenderer, CardEditorPanel. Config files at root level.
